query:
select
                        c.collected_at_utc as "last_collected_date",
                        p.id,
                        p.name,
                        p.base,
                        p.version,
                        p.homepage,
                        p.repository,
                        p.license,
                        gt.content as "description?"
                    from Products p left join GeneralTexts gt on p.description_hash = gt.hash,
                        Collections c
                    where p.last_collect_nr = c.nr
